scope: blood-cancer trial discovery, provenance capture, and public-safe case-matching research support

boundary: No private case values, identifiers, dates tied to a person, free-text notes, images, or re-identification keys.

status_policy.RECRUITING: Enrollment-discovery searches; still requires site verification.
status_policy.NOT_YET_RECRUITING: Near-future landscape searches; still requires site verification.
status_policy.ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING: Landscape or comparator searches, not enrollment discovery.
status_policy.TERMINATED: Failure-mode or historical searches; record carefully.
status_policy.WITHDRAWN: Failure-mode or historical searches; record carefully.
status_policy.SUSPENDED: Failure-mode or historical searches; record carefully.

limits: A trial listing is not proof that a trial is open at a specific site.
A trial listing is not proof that a person is eligible.
A trial listing is not proof of safety or efficacy.
Search counts can change as ClinicalTrials.gov records are updated.
Query strings can miss studies that use different disease or intervention wording.
ClinicalTrials.gov is a registry, not a substitute for source-paper review or clinician judgment.
